title: Resurgence
description: A Post-Apocalyptic modpack for a Post-Apocalyptic Survival server.
body:
### Resurgence is a post-apocalyptic Role-Play server based around agressive flora.
Explore a city returned to a violent nature, join one of the faction, help build the camp, surive.

The Server and Community is in French, we welcome everyone but it might be hard to integrate if you don't speak it.
